description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot, surrounded by a fence and lined with coniferous trees along the perimeter. The main building features a dark gable roof with two small dormers and a covered front porch supported by columns. The facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a central entrance. A detached garage with a matching gable roof sits to the right of the main house, connected by a driveway. The property includes a manicured front yard and a larger, tree-dotted backyard. The overall appearance is neat and suburban, with clear boundaries and landscaping.
description: A single-story, gable-roofed bungalow with a detached garage, fenced yard, and symmetrical front porch, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and detached garage, with trees lining the fence.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, fenced yard, and dense tree line at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear windows, and the back of the garage, with scattered trees in the yard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side porch, side windows, and the garage entrance, with the fence and trees visible.
